title: 2-to-4 Line Decoder Operation
description: A flowchart illustrating how a 2-to-4 line decoder processes binary inputs to activate one of four output lines, demonstrating the fundamental principle of address decoding in digital systems.
relationships: Input bits are processed by the decoder logic
The enable input must be active (high) for decoding to occur
A unique output line is activated (goes high) based on the binary value of the input
